prestazioni: APR Stage 3+ turbo kit for the **EA113 2.0T FSI (BPY/BWA/BWE)** engine, featuring a Garrett GT3071R Gen II turbocharger with a 0.63 A/R turbine housing, upgraded 630cc Siemens Deka injectors, and a custom APR-spec cast manifold with integrated T3 flange for optimized exhaust flow and reduced turbo lag. Includes a 3-inch downpipe with a GESI high-flow catalytic converter (200-cell) and a Vibrant 3.5-inch stainless steel cat-back exhaust with resonated center section for aggressive yet street-legal sound.

IE (Integrated Engineering) forged internals package for the **EA113 2.0T**, including a billet crankshaft with 86mm stroke, forged 83mm Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), IE H-beam connecting rods with ARP 2000 rod bolts, and a lightweight chromoly flywheel paired with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (500Nm torque capacity). Matched with an IE oil pump upgrade and baffled sump for sustained high-RPM oil control under lateral G-forces.

KW Suspension Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable) with monotube dampers, 8-position rebound adjustment, and 16-level compression damping, paired with H&R 24mm front and 22mm rear anti-roll bars (solid-mounted with spherical bearings). Chassis reinforcement includes a 034 Motorsport subframe collar kit, Neuspeed rear trailing arm bushings (polyurethane), and a Whiteline front sway bar end-link kit (adjustable) for precise turn-in response and reduced understeer.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the **MK5 Golf GTI**, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with aggressive 30mm flares, a carbon fiber rear bumper with integrated diffuser, and a 2-piece carbon fiber rear wing (adjustable angle) with aluminum supports. Includes custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof, mirrors, and lower rocker panels for a stealth-aggressive stance.

OEM+ Euro-spec lighting upgrade with Hella Dynamic LED headlights (projector-style, DRL-integrated), Osram Night Breaker Laser H7 bulbs (150% brighter), and Depo Racing smoked LED taillights with sequential turn signals. Front grille replaced with a carbon fiber VW Motorsport honeycomb mesh grille (painted gloss black) and a custom 3D-printed lower grille insert for improved intercooler airflow.

Interior overhaul with Recaro Sportster CS seats (fixed-back, Alcantara/leatherette) mounted on custom Bride seat rails for optimal driving position, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a NRG quick-release hub. Shift knob replaced with a BFI Stage 2 short shifter (aluminum, 75mm throw reduction) and a custom carbon fiber shift boot. Full sound deadening with Dynamat Xtreme applied to doors, floor, and roof, paired with a Focal Utopia Be 3-way component system (6.5-inch woofers, 1-inch tweeters) and a JL Audio 10TW3 subwoofer in a custom sealed enclosure.
